conventions.long_only_default: regime decision (Mar-Jun 2026 up-tape); short side untested not falsified

strategies.name: EMA proximity + acceleration, 5m

rules.entry: gap=EMA9-EMA50 (5m); enter long at bar close when |gap|<=0.5, gap<0, dGap>0 (converging up), ddGap>0 (accelerating)
rules.exit: flat at bar close when |gap|<=0.5, gap>0, dGap<0 (anticipated downcross)
rules.stop: none (known gap: no disaster brake; see V0b max loser)
rules.sizing: base 1; +1 when daily 9x50 gap >0 and rising (PF 5.7->8.1, DD unchanged)
rules.disaster_stop: 4*ATR below entry (2*ATR is poison per factorial)
rules.exit_study: NO price trails — all trail schemes destroy P&L (best +1,070 vs signal exit +4,935). Prop overlay: 1/3@2ATR,1/3@4ATR,runner = PF 9.6, DD -244, total halves

caveats: in-sample/tuned window; expect PF~2 live per 15m pseudo-OOS
n=22, top-3 trades = 61% of profit
no Feb-style down-month in dataset
selected from variant grid
next: blind OOS on Dec-Mar 5m batch
test mirrored short config on down months
test structural disaster stop
multi-TF runner: 5m exit closes 2/3, last 1/3 rides daily invalidation (untested)

oos_validation.dataset: DS-1M-DATABENTO resampled to 5m: src/data/MNQ_5m_12mo_databento.csv, 70539 bars, 2025-06-15..2026-06-14, exchange-direct, volume-verified, 0 OHLC violations
oos_validation.config_tested: FROZEN base unchanged: 9x50, k=0.02*ATR(14), accel ON, long-only, NO stop, NO daily-align, friction 1.0pt
oos_validation.method: true blind OOS — vault V4 tuned on TradingView 2026-03-08..06-12; everything before 2026-03-08 is data the model never saw

oos_unseen_all.note: top-3 trades exceed total net profit -> the remaining 40 trades are net-negative

aug2025_feb2026_unseen.note: BREAK-EVEN/DEAD on 7 months of genuinely unseen data

feb2026_correction.note: all 3 trades losers; long-only bleeds in the correction month exactly as caveat warned

is_overlap_new_data.note: re-running the same Mar8-Jun12 window on databento reproduces the vault IS PF (5.66) -> confirms the headline edge was specific to this up-tape window, not the data source

oos_validation.oos_is_pf_ratio: 0.18-0.20 (oos_unseen PF 1.13 / IS PF 5.66 vault or 6.37 new-data) -- WELL BELOW the 0.4 DEGRADED threshold

drift_control.spec: mandatory benchmark: random NY_AM long entries, horizon H=371 5m-bars matched to V4 median hold, n=200 seeded + 200-seed Monte-Carlo
drift_control.vs_v4: V4 full PF 2.38 beats drift 0.83, BUT the outperformance is entirely from the in-sample window; OOS-only PF 1.13 is barely above the drift baseline

oos_validation.verdict: FAILED BLIND OOS / DEGRADED. PF collapses from 5.66 (IS) to ~1.0 on unseen data; OOS/IS ratio 0.18-0.20 << 0.4. The vault headline PF was an artifact of the Mar-Jun 2026 up-tape window, reproducible only on that window. Edge is regime-conditional (up-tape), not a robust standalone long-only edge.
oos_validation.status_recommendation: DEMOTE from FROZEN_AWAITING_OOS via the lifecycle (T11). Do NOT deploy unconditional long-only. Re-frame as regime-gated (deploy only in confirmed up-tape, kill in corrections). Status field left unchanged here pending operator/T11 decision per constitution rule 2.
caveats: effective day-level n is small (OOS 39 days, Aug-Feb 31 days)
extreme profit concentration OOS (top-3 = 263% of net)
databento MNQ vs TradingView MNQ: minor source differences, IS-overlap 6.37 vs vault 5.66 within source noise

strategies.name: EMA proximity base, 15m k=1.5 (acceleration ablation)
caveats: kept as ablation control: acceleration condition = PF 1.55->2.12 and halves max loser, replicated on both timeframes

strategies.name: London zone (OB+FVG) NY tap, multi-touch, long-only

rules.zones: OB: last down-close candle before 1.5xATR displacement breaking 10-bar swing high, formed in London. FVG: 3-bar gaps inside 2xATR/3-bar displacement legs, merged. Zone=full range
rules.survival: multi-touch: zone dies only on 5m CLOSE beyond far edge; <=1 pre-NY touch preferred
rules.entry: zone midpoint on first NY tap
rules.exit: trail under 6-bar swing low after +1R; EOD flatten 15:55 (note: EOD constraint now lifted per operator — retest hold-through variant)

caveats: definitions iterated 4x on same 3-month window — researcher DoF accumulated; expect material OOS haircut
concurrent same-day signals share outcomes; day-level effective n~60
EOD-flatten rule now obsolete given hold-through-validity mandate
next: blind OOS Dec-Mar
retest with hold-through exits
P&L for Asia zones same config (excursion stats positive: PF 2.13 n=49)

strategies.name: Asia zone NY tap, multi-touch, long-only

rules.as: LVL_IMB_LONDON_5M but zones formed in Asia; survival through Asia+London via close-through rule

results.note: 1-touch subset PF 7.2 n=10; 2+ touches NEGATIVE PF 0.89

caveats: touch-count finding: fresh/1-touch good, 2+ touches erode — zones valid through ~2 interactions only
next: pool with London engine in OOS validation

strategies.name: Session H/L interaction day-map

rules.states: London vs Asia: HOLD_HI/HOLD_LO/SWEEP_HI/SWEEP_LO/BOTH/INSIDE; NY first-break side; AM result

results.one_side_days: NY breaks ON low first -> takes ON high same AM only 13% (base 54), n=91; mirror 15% (base 48) n=108
results.london_hold_draw: London holds above Asia -> NY_AM takes ON high 85% (base 54) n=52; mirror 79% n=39
results.am_pm_persistence: AM up -> PM takes AM high 72% (base 47) n=123; AM down -> PM takes AM low 58% (base 35) n=100
results.conflict_cells: London hold + NY breaks opposite side first: 3-4 occurrences in 223 days (structural near-impossibility)
results.reversal_am: ON low first BUT AM closes up -> PM takes AM high 68% n=31 (not Bonferroni-sig; matches sweep-reclaim house pattern)
results.suppressor: non-committed London days (sweep/inside/both): crossover-type systems PF 0.60; suppress trend logic

caveats: liquidity-draw predictions, not close-direction predictions
223 days one regime
next: formalize as context feed for all engines
encode suppressor in risk manager

results.excursion: 15m zones/5m resolution: bull MFE/MAE 1.81 n=66 vs drift control 0.93; bear side dead ~1.0
results.sweep_tap_inversion: tap bar sweeping London extreme -> reversion collapses (MFE/MAE 0.18 n=39, 15m) — sweep+tap = skip/continuation filter

strategies.name: V4 mirror — bearish proximity + acceleration, 5m
strategies.dataset: untested by design — deploy-on-regime; validate on first bear window (Dec-Mar batch and/or live shadow)

rules.entry: SHORT at bar close when |G| <= 0.02*ATR(14), G > 0, dG < 0 (converging down), ddG < 0 (acceleration down)
rules.exit: flat when |G| <= 0.02*ATR(14), G < 0, dG > 0 (anticipated upcross) — gap IS the trail; no price trails
rules.sizing: base 1 unit; +1 unit when DAILY 9x50 gap < 0 AND falling (mirror daily-align)
rules.scale_out_overlay_prop: cover 1/3 at +2*ATR, 1/3 at +4*ATR, runner on signal

caveats: UNTESTED — symmetry assumed, not demonstrated. Known asymmetries: bear approaches faster/more violent (gentle-approach may rarely fire or fire late); squeeze risk; overnight drift against shorts
short side of two-sided prox in Mar-Jun UP-tape was PF 1.00 — expected; says nothing about bear regimes
activation regime-gated by operator (daily gap <0 falling and/or QQQ read)
next: blind test on Feb 2026 window when Dec-Mar data lands
review ddG asymmetry if bear approaches too fast for 1-bar accel

strategies.name: EMA proximity + acceleration, 1m (exploratory timeframe test)
strategies.dataset: DS-1M-EXPLORATORY (not registered): src/data/NQ_1m_aggregated_clean.csv — 2425 1m bars, 2026-06-11 03:35 to 2026-06-12 20:59 UTC (~41h; tail of DS-5M window, NOT independent OOS); cleaned 0 dupes / 0 OHLC violations / 0 overlap conflicts

rules.config: base V4 made comparable to the 5m vault base: k=0.02*ATR(14), acceleration ON (ddG>0), long-only, NO daily-align, NO stop; friction 1.0pt; EMAs 9/50 ewm adjust=False; ATR simple rolling-mean

drift_control.spec: mandatory benchmark: random same-session NY_AM long entries, horizon H=41 1m-bars (matched to V4's single 41-min hold), n=200 seeded + 200-seed Monte-Carlo

results.vs_benchmark: V4 PF 0.00 < drift PF 1.59; drift MFE/MAE ~1.0 (neutral up-tape window). V4 does NOT beat the benchmark — but n=1 so statistically meaningless

caveats: EXPLORATORY / UNTESTED new timeframe — do NOT promote. Logged because negative results are first-class (prevents re-testing a dead config blindly).

Signal essentially does not fire on 1m: only 1 entry in 2425 bars. k=0.02*ATR on 1m yields a tiny proximity band; the engine likely needs timeframe-specific k retuning before any 1m conclusion is valid.
Data window ~2 days (Jun 11-12 2026) is the TAIL of the 5m vault window — not independent OOS and far too short (the 5m base ran 3 months / 19168 bars for its +4935).
n=1, a single -13.8pt loser — no statistical inference; not comparable to the 5m vault headline.
1m export carries no volume; a full multi-month 1m series (ideally with volume) is required before evaluating this timeframe.
Source is full-size NQ (~$20/pt); 5m/15m vault data is the MNQ export — point magnitudes comparable, $ values differ.
next: acquire a full multi-month, independent-window 1m NQ export before any further 1m test
if pursued, retune k to the 1m ATR scale and re-run with the drift control

strategies.name: V4 on native 1-minute timeframe, 12mo databento (exploratory)

rules.config: frozen V4 base on 1m closes: 9x50, accel ON, long-only, NO stop, NO daily-align, friction 1.0pt
rules.k_derivation: k=0.02*ATR(14) retained — already volatility-relative so it transfers without fitting (1m ATR median 7.48 -> 0.15pt band vs 5m 17.66 -> 0.35pt). Sensitivity scan k_mult 0.02->0.20 shows PF degrading monotonically (0.02->1.29, 0.04->0.88, 0.06->0.78, 0.10->0.71); matching the 5m ABSOLUTE band (k_mult~0.047) is already PF<1. No k makes 1m profitable — selection by structure/frequency, not P&L.

oos_unseen_pre_mar2026.note: barely above breakeven; the other 231 trades are net-negative

drift_control.spec: mandatory benchmark: random NY_AM long entries, H=294 1m-bars (V4 median hold), n=200 seeded + 200-seed MC

results.vs_benchmark: 1m full PF 1.29 marginally beats drift 0.90; OOS-only PF 1.07 is at the drift baseline

caveats: EXPLORATORY new timeframe — do NOT promote.
Edge does NOT survive at 1m: full PF 1.29, blind-OOS PF 1.07 (vs 5m in-sample 5.66, 5m blind-OOS ~1.0). Higher frequency adds noise; even the in-sample window only reaches PF 1.74.
Supersedes the earlier 2-day stub EMA_PROX_V4_1M_TEST (n=1 on a 2-day volumeless TradingView file); this is the proper 12-month, volume-verified, exchange-direct test.
Extreme profit concentration OOS (top-3 trades = 209% of net profit).
1m holds average ~9.6h — still multi-hour swing behavior, not scalping; the timeframe change did not convert V4 into a high-frequency edge.
next: do not pursue 1m for V4 as a standalone edge; 5m remains the V4 timeframe
retain 1m data for SHOCK_v1 and microstructure work
